name: Shanghai Shuixing Home Textile Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Shuixing Home Textile Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, production, and sale of home textiles in China and internationally. It offers bedspreads, quilts, pillows, single-piece combinations, cushions, children's products, summer supplies, blankets, and others. The company sells its products through specialty stores and mall counters in China. Shanghai Shuixing Home Textile Co., Ltd. was founded in 2009 and is based in Shanghai, China.
